character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A slender arcane scholar in flowing purple robes with wide sleeves, hood drawn back revealing long silver hair. Ornate wooden staff crowned with a glowing violet rune-crystal held in one hand. Spellbook chained to belt, pouches of reagents. Pale skin, intense focused eyes. Faint wisps of arcane energy swirling at fingertips. Palette: deep purple #4A2E75, soft violet #8E6DC8, lavender #E8D5FF. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
